deals.Description: Helsinki & Oulu-based cybersecurity startup building an AI-powered platform that automates cybersecurity testing and compliance for connected devices.
deals.Investors: Vendep Capital, Aapo Oksman, Zach Shelby, Neil Costigan, Ääkköset Oy, ScanABC, Business Finland

deals.Description: AI cloud company investing in a 310MW AI Factory (data center) in Lappeenranta, Finland, set to become one of Europe's largest dedicated AI facilities.
Develops real-time nervous system technology across apps and wearables, aiming to scale its technology.
Quantum computing company focused on accelerating its quantum roadmap and global expansion.

Espoo-based deep-tech company, a spin-off from Aalto University, developing patented ultralight, flexible metasurface antennas for high-impact signal performance and coverage in aerospace, defense, and telecommunications.

Polarnode Oy, a Finnish data center developer, is partnering with Nebius, an AI cloud company, to deliver a 310-megawatt AI factory in Lappeenranta, Finland. This multi-billion euro project, valued at over $10 billion, will be one of Europe's largest dedicated AI data centers, coming online in phases from 2027.

Develops full-stack superconducting quantum computers for research institutions, high-performance computing centers, and enterprises. The company focuses on accelerating technology development and expanding globally.
